detectors.description:

	Dangerous calls:

detectors.description:

	- DataBase.delegatecall(bytes4(sha3()(AddToDB(address))),msg.sender) (Router.sol#47)

detectors.description:
Router.transfer(address).adr (Router.sol#37) lacks a zero-check on :
		- adr.transfer(this.balance) (Router.sol#49)

Router.Set(address,uint256).dataBase (Router.sol#19) lacks a zero-check on :
		- DataBase = dataBase (Router.sol#27)

Deprecated standard detected DataBase.delegatecall(bytes4(sha3()(AddToDB(address))),msg.sender) (Router.sol#47):
	- Usage of "sha3()" should be replaced with "keccak256()"
detectors.markdown:
Deprecated standard detected [DataBase.delegatecall(bytes4(sha3()(AddToDB(address))),msg.sender)](Router.sol#L47):
	- Usage of "sha3()" should be replaced with "keccak256()"

detectors.description: solc-0.4.26 is an outdated solc version. Use a more recent version (at least 0.8.0), if possible.

detectors.description:
Version constraint ^0.4.18 contains known severe issues (https://solidity.readthedocs.io/en/latest/bugs.html)
	- DirtyBytesArrayToStorage
	- ABIDecodeTwoDimensionalArrayMemory
	- KeccakCaching
	- EmptyByteArrayCopy
	- DynamicArrayCleanup
	- ImplicitConstructorCallvalueCheck
	- TupleAssignmentMultiStackSlotComponents
	- MemoryArrayCreationOverflow
	- privateCanBeOverridden
	- SignedArrayStorageCopy
	- ABIEncoderV2StorageArrayWithMultiSlotElement
	- DynamicConstructorArgumentsClippedABIV2
	- UninitializedFunctionPointerInConstructor_0.4.x
	- IncorrectEventSignatureInLibraries_0.4.x
	- ExpExponentCleanup
	- EventStructWrongData
	- NestedArrayFunctionCallDecoder.
It is used by:
	- ^0.4.18 (Router.sol#1)
